name: kag-operational-project-management-platform-confirmed
description: KAG Operational Platform — PDF/PPTX reports hardened with Python dependency bootstrap

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/script.js && node scripts/verify-package.js
scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-package.js && python3 -c "import pptx, reportlab; print('python-report-deps-ok')"
scripts.postinstall: python3 -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt || python -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt || true
